exhibits.name: Franchisee List
exhibits.description: Names, addresses, and telephone numbers of all current and former franchisees. Includes 272 total franchises (266 operating) plus 6 signed-but-not-open. Also includes former franchisees who ceased operating in most recent fiscal year.
exhibits.notes: Contains PII (names, addresses, phone numbers). Confidentiality clause flagged — some franchisees have signed provisions restricting ability to speak openly.

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.description: Audited consolidated financial statements of FS Brands, Inc. (parent of PDRI). Two audit reports by PricewaterhouseCoopers LLP: (1) FY2024 and FY2023 (pages 89-112), (2) FY2023 and FY2022 (pages 113-135). Includes balance sheets, income statements, statements of changes in equity, cash flow statements, and notes to financial statements.
exhibits.notes: Clean (unqualified) opinion from PwC on both periods. Statements are consolidated for FS Brands (includes California Closets, CertaPro, FCI, Pillar to Post, PDR Canada, etc.) — not PDRI standalone.

exhibits.name: Guarantee of Performance
exhibits.description: FS Brands, Inc. absolutely and unconditionally guarantees PDRI's obligations under the Franchise Agreement.
exhibits.notes: Cover page on page 136; page 137 appears to be image-based (text not extractable). Guarantee fact confirmed in Item 21 text.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement
exhibits.description: Complete Franchise Agreement including main body (pages 138-179) and internal exhibits to the FA: Exhibit A (Territory), Exhibit B (Guarantee), Exhibit C (Non-Compete/Confidentiality), Exhibit D (form agreements), Exhibit E (State Amendments), Exhibit F (Acknowledgment/Spousal Consent) (pages 180-190).
exhibits.notes: Primary contract document. Cross-references Articles 1-32. Includes spousal acknowledgment binding spouse to non-compete, non-disclosure, and dispute resolution.

exhibits.name: Commercial Program Agreement
exhibits.description: Optional Commercial Loss Lead Program agreement. Franchisees may opt in by amendment to FA. Program involves PDRI referring commercial restoration customers; 5% program fee on commercial jobs.

exhibits.name: Schedule of State Administrators and Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.description: List of state franchise administrators and designated agents for service of process in registration states.

exhibits.name: State Addenda
exhibits.description: State-specific addenda to FDD and FA for 14 states: California (pages 203-205), Hawaii (206-207), Illinois (208-209), Indiana (210-211), Maryland (212-213), Michigan (214-216), Minnesota (217), New York (218-220), North Dakota (221-222), Rhode Island (223-224), South Dakota (225), Virginia (226), Washington (227-229), Wisconsin (230-231).
exhibits.notes: Material state overrides include: CA — liquidated damages restrictions, general release restrictions, arbitration within CA; IL — 180 day cure rights, governing law Illinois; IN — additional protections; MD — fee refund within first year, civil liability; MI — 180 day non-renewal notice; MN — various protections; NY — termination protections; WA — release restrictions, venue in WA.

exhibits.name: Promissory Note
exhibits.description: Form promissory note for financing of up to 50% of initial franchise fee. 4-year term, 7% APR. Cross-default with FA.
exhibits.notes: All owners must individually sign. Prepayment permitted without penalty.

exhibits.name: Paul Davis Restoration Operations Manual — Table of Contents
exhibits.description: Table of contents of the proprietary Operations Manual. Manual itself is not included in FDD.
exhibits.notes: Manual governs day-to-day operations. Changes require District/General Council vote.

exhibits.name: Franchise Resale Procedures and Agreements
exhibits.description: Resale procedures, documentation requirements, Tri-Party Agreement, Voluntary Termination Agreement and Release, Resale Escrow Letter, and related forms used in connection with franchise resales.
exhibits.notes: Includes detailed resale documentation checklist and diagrams.
